policy_name: ICICI Lombard Complete Health Insurance (Health Shield)

min_entry_age.source_quote: Dependent child entry standard 91 days (per Policy Schedule)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum renewal age - There will be life-long renewal without any age restriction (entry age per Policy Schedule)

max_renewal_age.source_quote: There will be life-long renewal without any age restriction for the cover.

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured 3 lacs/ 4 lacs/ 5 lacs 7 lacs/ 10 lacs 15lacs / 20lacs / 25Lacs / 50lacs

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: (d) Initial waiting period: 30 days for all illnesses (except Hospitalisation due to injury).

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: (a) Pre-existing diseases: Declared and accepted PED will be covered after 24 months of continuous coverage.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: (c) Specific waiting period: First 24 months, for specific Illness and treatment.

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity not listed in base benefit table (offered as optional benefit only)

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre & Post Hospitalisation Medical Expenses incurred due to Illness up to 30 days period immediately before and 60 days immediately after

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 30 days period immediately before and 60 days immediately after an Insured Person's admission to a Hospital

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Procedure: Medical expenses for day care procedures (list maintained on ICICI Lombard website)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: In Patient AYUSH Hospitalization — Reimbursement of expenses for AYUSH treatment

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity not in base benefit grid (Complete Health Insurance excludes maternity from base; optional add-on)

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Maternity excluded; newborn cover tied to maternity

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Donor Expenses: Medical Expenses incurred in respect of the donor expenses up to Sum insured ... subject to a limit of Rs.10 Lakhs. The limit for this cover is over and above annual sum insured

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Additional Sum Insured (Cumulative bonus) An additional sum insured of 10% of annual sum insured for each completed and continuous claim free Policy Year subject to a maximum of 50%

restoration_benefit.value: Unlimited Reset Benefit (available unlimited times per policy year)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: Unlimited Reset Benefit ... will be available unlimited times in a policy year in case the Sum insured ... is insufficient

room_rent_capping.value: Per Policy Schedule (Single Private AC Room typical for higher SI plans)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Standard room entitlement per Policy Schedule

copayment_pct.source_quote: No mandatory base copay (World Wide Cover optional with 10% co-pay; otherwise 0%)

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Cashless Facility available at over 6500+ network hospitals.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless or Reimbursement of covered medical expenses up to specified Sum Insured as per the scope of cover.

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

_meta.notes: ICICI Lombard Complete Health Insurance (Health Shield retail variant): clean Key Information Sheet. 24-month PED, 30/60 pre/post, Unlimited Reset, NCB 10% per claim-free year capped 50%.
